title: Design Team: Violeta's Life Is Beautiful Layout
excerpt: Hello! I am happy to be back with you in this blog sharing my scrabooking ideas. I love the “Sunshine & Good Times” collection of Amy Tangerine. It is perfect of any pictures of a travel. I love creating layouts…
body:
Hello!

I am happy to be back with you in this blog sharing my scrabooking ideas. I love the “Sunshine & Good Times” collection of Amy Tangerine. It is perfect of any pictures of a travel.

I love creating layouts and I want to show you how I have made this one.

I have made the layout using small pictures of a travel. For the base of the layout, I have used a patterned paper from the collection “Sunshine & Good Times”.

I have combined the two photographs with different cards that I have cut from a paper of the collection “Sunshine & Good Times”.

To decorate the project, I have used different stickers from the Sticker Book of Amy Tangerine. I love stickers! I have also used a golden washi tape that combines with the title of the layout.

I have added some journaling in the project in a small card so I can have written the memories of these photographs. I have also added some yellow enamels to give more color to the layout.

Finally, I have stamped some stamps from the collection “Sunshine & Good Times” in black color, to add more fun to the project.

It is a very simple project that you can use with your favorite photographs of a travel or a very special day.

If you have any questions about the project let me know in the comments.

Violeta Scrap

Blog| Instagram| Twitter| Facebook| YouTube

Supplies: Sunshine & Good Times - 12x12 Double Sided Paper - Bloom Big Time (345707), Sunshine & Good Times - 12x12 Double Sided Paper - Oficially Obessed (345684), Sunshine & Good Times - Sticker Book (344862), Sunshine & Good Times - Stamps and Ink Pads (345723), On a Whim - Washi Tape Spools (378747)

Thanks so much for sharing this layout with us, Violeta! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop Sunshine and Good Times at your local retailer or online at Scrapbook.com and Simon Says Stamp.
